items.anchor: मेरे दादा हर रोज़ सुबह टहलते हैं

items.far: मेरे नाना हर रोज़ सुबह टहलते हैं
items.anchor_en: My grandfather takes a walk every morning
items.near_en: My grandfather walks every morning
items.far_en: My grandfather takes a walk every morning
items.notes: dada = paternal grandfather; nana = maternal grandfather. English collapses both to 'grandfather'.

items.anchor: मेरी दादी बहुत अच्छी कहानियाँ सुनाती हैं

items.near_en: My grandmother tells very beautiful stories
items.far_en: My grandmother tells very good stories
items.notes: dadi = paternal grandmother; nani = maternal grandmother. English collapses both to 'grandmother'.

items.anchor: मेरे मामा ने मुझे साइकिल दिलाई

items.near_en: My uncle bought me a bicycle
items.far_en: My uncle got me a bicycle
items.notes: mama = maternal uncle; chacha = paternal uncle. English collapses both to 'uncle'.

items.anchor: मेरी मौसी शहर से बाहर गई हैं

items.near_en: My aunt has left the city
items.far_en: My aunt has gone out of the city
items.notes: mausi = mother's sister; bua = father's sister. English collapses both to 'aunt'.

items.near: मेरे फूफा जी बहुत कड़क हैं

items.far_en: My uncle is very strict
items.notes: phupha = husband of father's sister; mausa = husband of mother's sister. English collapses both to 'uncle'.

items.anchor: मेरी मामी ने आज मिठाई बनाई

items.near_en: My nephew cleared the exam
